ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "disp" REAL /* Engine displacement (in cubic inches) */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "drat" REAL /* Rear axle ratio */,
  "wt" REAL /* Weight of the car (in 1000 lbs) */,
  "qsec" REAL /* Quarter mile time (in seconds) */,
  "vs" INTEGER /* Engine configuration (0 = V-shaped, 1 = straight) */,
  "am" INTEGER /* Transmission type (0 = automatic, 1 = manual) */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Number of forward gears */,
  "carb" INTEGER /* Number of carburetors */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the car */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the car */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the car */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the car model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the car make */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the car make was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car make */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the car make */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the car make */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the car make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car make */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the car model */,
  "door_count" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the car model */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine configuration */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the engine (V-shaped or straight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine configuration */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters or cubic centimeters */,
  "cylinder_arrangement" TEXT /* Arrangement of the cylinders in the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_configurations_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (automatic or manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "transmission_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_types_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gear_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear ratio */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Gear number */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the gear ratio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gear ratio */,
  "gear_ratio_description" TEXT /* Description of the gear ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gear_ratios_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carburetors" (
  "carb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carburetor configuration */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "carburetor_count" INTEGER /* Number of carburetors */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carburetor configuration */,
  "carburetor_type" TEXT /* Type of carburetor used in the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carburetors_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Mode of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "option_price" REAL /* Price of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_options_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_images_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_videos_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
